_meta.prompt_bodies: design/methodist_v2/door_prompts.md (by door id) — Core lifts executable bodies from there; kept DRY, must stay in sync
_meta.primitives: all v1; names = framework §6 vocabulary; wired by (id, version)
_meta.core_sync_needed: exact I/O form of state-primitives finalized in Phase 2 against the live graph. Slot names aligned to Core's confirmed target column (tickets ...-0588/0589).
_meta.gated_disabled: dedup-detect composition present in framework §6 but GATED (Vlad's standing requirement — own trial before autonomous). NOT wired into the live checkpoint publish path this wave.

confirmed_semantics.verdict_branch: write-graph-records branches internally on verdict: GO → scientific claim + quality-stamp; RETURN → path/fact only (attempt+why), NOT a claim. Upstream transforms run unconditionally (§5.4).
confirmed_semantics.update_run_state: one primitive, variant params, branch-by-data internally (verdict=GO → go_mark+advance; RETURN → no go_mark; status→set).
confirmed_semantics.create_corrective_activity: RESERVED for supersede-of-published-claim (GO refinement of a prior claim; immutability add+link §7 inv-6), input from apply-supersede-guards — NOT fired on RETURN (RETURN corrections live in the checkpoint_return outcome-activity's activity_content). Dormant in the live checkpoint this wave (tied to gated dedup/supersede). ticket ...-0597.
confirmed_semantics.vectorize_and_store: no-op on RETURN (no claim → no vector), branch-by-data-null. [confirm Core]
confirmed_semantics.update_dossier_mapping: derives delta from verdict+tier_signal: autonomy_by_context[cycle] ONLY from verdict.next_dose.autonomy.level (carrier judgment, never GO-count); tier_by_context[creative_element]=tier_signal.target_tier (only when probe fired); passed_units+=unit on GO-with-unit; corrections_history RETURN→not_yet / GO→mark-applied; patches_received+=verdict.patches.
confirmed_semantics.update_dossier_mapping_ownership: These rules are METHODOLOGY-OWNED POLICY, not primitive-intrinsic (framework §6: primitives are methodology-agnostic). v1: Core hardwires them into update-dossier for the single methodology (YAGNI, ticket ...-0590/0591). Target form: params-driven (rules as methodology params → generic flat-map writer). This _meta block is the SOURCE OF TRUTH for the rules; changing them is a methodology patch (methods-council), not a primitive change. Lift to params on the second methodology.
confirmed_semantics.dose_storage: property of the run node (Neo4j); current dose only; dose history = immutable journal activities.
confirmed_semantics.agent_id_credential_id: diagnose input agent_id maps to create-run credential_id (one entity) — confirm no lookup needed [Core].

message.const: Diagnosis could not map your intent to a methodology cycle. Please restate your research intent more concretely — are you trying to: discover something new (c1), verify a specific published claim (c2), synthesize/map a field (c3), study or build a method (c4), map a live dispute (c5), set a research agenda (c6), engineer a solution to a practical need (c8), or review a work already on the platform (c9)? — then call diagnose again.

procedures.name: checkpoint
procedures._note: Core of the protocol. Deterministic guards are early gates. Model call produces the two-axis verdict. Publish path folds in, driven by verdict (§4). Persist runs unconditionally (branch by data). dedup-detect NOT wired (gated).

steps._note: assembles the outcome-activity (checkpoint_go|checkpoint_return) carrying activity_content{run_id, stage, cycle_context, quality (GO), reasons+corrections (RETURN), track_note (both)}; GO also writes annotated scientific claims; RETURN writes only the outcome-activity (no claim).

reason.const: submission contains non-English text — resubmit in English

procedures.name: ask
procedures._note: MERGED course+consult (single-door route, §3). Mid-stage guidance/clarification within the CURRENT cycle-stage dose; frame-anchored (cycle/stage prominent, anti-drift). MAY emit a dose_adjustment (course-mode, data-driven) or answer as pure clarification (consult-mode). NEVER advances the stage; never does the mentee's work (boundary 1). update-run-state applies dose_adjustment branch-by-data (no-op when absent → consult-mode leaves state unchanged).

procedures.name: methodist
procedures._note: Single-door dispatcher (§3.1). fetch-run-state → route-intent decides diagnose|checkpoint|ask from run_state + payload, then dispatches to that sub-procedure. PUBLISH-SAFETY: checkpoint fires ONLY when the payload carries an explicit submission_hash (route-intent never synthesizes it); an artifact WITHOUT submission_hash always routes to ask, never to checkpoint.

_non_model_channels._note: escalate + get_my_development are NON-model channels (framework §3), not carrier doors. Likely direct endpoint→primitive, no procedure needed; included minimally for completeness — confirm with Core whether they route through the interpreter or bypass it.

_process._note: §12.1 process-layer VALUES (methodist-owned; 2e reads from the methodology object). run-derived `done` status = presence of a non-superseded `version_closeout` activity for the run (durable append-only marker emitted at the closeout-checkpoint GO; v1.8 — done no longer recomputes against a mutable table). The stable final-stage map lives as a git-constant in Core's one-time back-fill script, NOT here (final_stage_by_cycle removed v1.8). path_node_shapes = the field-sets of the typed path nodes. Process nodes are opaque/not content-addressed (§12.1); hash-scopes are NOT here. ⚠ NB: course_event + consult_event MERGED → ask_event — the single-door merge (in main) means the `ask` procedure journals a const `ask` event, so course/consult path-nodes no longer occur; ask_event carries the ask_out fields.

_meta.purpose: GENERIC (task-agnostic) per-(cycle,stage) dose table = deterministic source for Core's derive-dose primitive (t5rb). Replaces the task-specific LLM-expansion (the reproducibility bug). Authored from production_door_prompts_v2.md §D playbooks + §C universal spine; cross-checked vs dose_dump_reference_2026-07-16.md.
_meta.keyed_by: internal current_stage INTEGER. c2-c9: §D-label == current_stage. ★ c1 (only 0-indexed §D): current_stage = §D-label + 1 → c1 St0->key 1 ... St6->key 7 (done=8). c1 cells keyed 1-7, NOT 0-6 (Core empirical catch 0031). c7 RESERVED (no stages).
_meta.note: operations = task-agnostic protocol steps (ward tailors to its concrete task in EXECUTION, not in the dose). beacons = key requirements / quality-gates. counters = 'do NOT' guards. expected_artifacts = stage outputs. Derive-dose emits the FULL field-set every stage. Closeout stages share the §C closeout-spine counters (no bundle manifest; no content-nesting of relation/metric/activity; no evidence in metric/activity).
_meta.rollout: complete-table-first (Vlad GO 2026-07-16, contract rev12 commit 7a5e552 / rollout-ruling 5fc4d81). fallback = safety-net + coverage-log only, NOT phasing.
_meta.status: COMPLETE — all cycles authored; c3.5 carries the #1+#4 bundle fix; allowed ward activity_type = {version_closeout} (strict).

operations: Sweep the literature open-eyed to find a TENSION (one of: contradiction / unresolved debate / silenced question / unexplained pattern / missed connection).
Formulate an OPERATIONALIZABLE question.
Fix a contribution criterion (significant advance vs technical refinement).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Tension explicitly categorized as one of the 5 valid types.
Question is operationalizable with exact metrics.
Contribution criterion fixed before proceeding.
counters: Do not proceed without a clear operationalizable question.
Do not dress a technical refinement as a discovery.

operations: Phase A: establish what the hypothesis stands on (foundations).

Phase B (unsaidness): is this ALREADY said? Search >=3 channels — document-semantic on concepts, citations-from-foundations, keyword on the thesis, and methodist_search_semantic over the layer-2 claim graph (the paraphrase-robust near-duplicate check that protects the novelty guarantee), plus methodist_search + methodist_find.
On 'already said' -> explicit decision (reframe / accept derivative / close).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Unsaidness checked across >=3 channels INCLUDING the layer-2 semantic near-dup.
Watch for a recent (1-2y) missed work.
counters: Do not skip the layer-2 paraphrase-robust check (keyword search misses paraphrases).

operations: Map the landscape (map-reduce): approaches, active vs faded zones, SILOS, GAPS.
Flag ABC-bridges, transfer-candidates, lifted-assumptions.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Silos and gaps identified; bridges/transfers flagged.
Active-vs-faded distinction made.
counters: Do not conflate active and faded zones.

operations: Generate hypotheses (delegate by MOVE TYPE, not topic): ABC-bridging / method-transfer / result-composition / assumption-lifting / frame-shift / inversion.
Each candidate: claim_type = inference|analogy, outcome = UNVERIFIABLE.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

P-2 atomicity (extract atomically from the start) — one proposition = one claim; numbers separated from interpretations; distinct findings from the same work = separate records (incl. temporal/phase claims). Composite claims are rejected — atomize up front to avoid re-work.
beacons: Every move-type represented.
Candidates are concrete, not 'it would be nice if'.
counters: Do not leave a move-type unrepresented.
Do not submit vague candidates.

operations: IdeaRank per candidate (Utility / Grounding / Contribution).
Pointwise unsaidness re-check per candidate.
Assess feasibility.
Select ONE with justification + a development plan.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: One selected with justification + development plan.
Per-candidate unsaidness re-check done.
counters: Do not select without a justification and development plan.

operations: EviBound core: Approval Gate (evidence-contract).
Obtain evidence — FORMAL slice (code/benchmark/proof, platform-closable) vs EMPIRICAL slice (platform gives experiment-prep only; validation is off-platform, a stated limit not a defect).
Record verification.outcome; pass the Verification Gate.
Targeted P5' (main agent reads first-hand).
Log failed attempts (a negative result IS a result).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: EviBound Approval + Verification passed.
P5' first-hand on load-bearing outcomes.
Failed attempts logged.
counters: Do not skip the Approval Gate.
Do not treat off-platform empirical validation as a defect.

operations: Integration & publication: update landscape + foundations.
Branch by outcome — VERIFIED -> positive discovery + get_my_document_review + publish; REJECTED -> negative-result genre (or return to Stage-0); UNVERIFIABLE -> seed cycle 4/6.
Compute AAR (PCov/claim_survival/CTran) via methodist_traverse(relation_class=epistemic) over the §7 closeout relations (graph-computed, class-pure).
Submit the closeout checkpoint (cross-stage relations + AAR metrics + version_closeout activity).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Compose the final discovery-note / short-communication in version_closeout.content.deliverable_document (in-graph, object form — NOT by mail): a concise claim + the genuinely NEW evidence (not only argumentation/citations) + priority-timestamp + attribution. GUARD: introduce new evidence; avoid salami-slicing.
beacons: Outcome-branch taken explicitly.
AAR graph-computed (not hand-reconstructed).
Disconfirmation if any AAR >= 0.95.
counters: Do not submit a bundle manifest (auto-composes).
Do not nest relation/metric/activity under content.
Do not include evidence in metric or activity records.
expected_artifacts: human-facing research-log (chronological, composed from per-stage track_notes)

operations: Select a claim to verify + justify the reason (one of: fundamental / long-unchecked / reproducibility-suspicion / missing-artifacts / active-dispute).
State expected value (all 'low' => refuse).
Fix scope + explicit exclusions.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Reason categorized; expected value stated.
Scope + exclusions explicit.
counters: Do not verify a claim whose expected value is all-low.

operations: Main-agent first-hand read; extract operationalizable checkable claims (measurement/inference; fill value_unit_method_uncertainty).
FIX non-operationalizable claims separately (itself a result).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

P-2 atomicity (extract atomically from the start) — one proposition = one claim; numbers separated from interpretations; distinct findings from the same work = separate records (incl. temporal/phase claims). Composite claims are rejected — atomize up front to avoid re-work.
beacons: Claims operationalizable with value/unit/method/uncertainty.
Non-operationalizable claims flagged separately.
counters: Do not extract from snippets (P-4).
Do not submit composite claims (P-2).

operations: Materials inventory: repo open? code smoke-tests? data? method described enough? hidden params?
Delta 'have vs need'; record the dependency-discovery path.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Have-vs-need delta explicit.
Dependency path recorded.
counters: Do not skip smoke-testing available code.

operations: Reproduction (core): Approval Gate.
REAL repetition per claim (computational: run; empirical: prep only, external validation off-platform).
Record outcome + audit_replayable; pass the Verification Gate.
Targeted P5' on ALL outcomes.
Determinism-check: 3x identical seed -> bit-identical (not multi-seed unless confirmed stochastic).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Approval + Verification gates passed.
P5' on all outcomes; audit_replayable set.
Determinism vs stochastic handled correctly.
counters: Do not skip the Approval Gate.
Do not multi-seed unless the process is confirmed stochastic.
expected_artifacts: reproduction claim records with verification.outcome + audit_replayable

operations: Refine bounds — VERIFIED: was it over-claimed? which params/assumptions. REJECTED: is there a narrow working zone? UNVERIFIABLE: exact cause.
Rewrite the claims precisely.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Over-claim / working-zone / cause identified.
Claims rewritten precisely.
counters: Do not leave an over-claim unqualified.

operations: Reusable artifacts (main output): cleaned documented code (README + repro + deps + smoke), structured dataset, methodology note, refined claim as standalone.
Ensure handoff without author help.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Artifacts reusable + handoff-ready without author help.
counters: Do not treat the cycle as done without this stage (it is the meaningful output).

operations: Side findings (optional): classify each as a seed to cycle 1/6/5/4.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Side findings routed as seeds.
counters: Do not drop a side finding without classifying it.

operations: Publish re-check (distinct genre).
PSnd is the MAIN metric (low PSnd = important negative finding), computed with the AAR set via methodist_traverse(relation_class=epistemic) over the §7 relations (graph-computed, class-pure).
Submit the closeout checkpoint.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Compose the final empirical report in version_closeout.content.deliverable_document (in-graph, object form — NOT by mail) per IMRaD hourglass: Introduction → Methods → Results → Discussion + the applicable reporting-checklist (enumerated checkable items). GUARD: report execution-verified results, not self-reported intention.
beacons: PSnd graph-computed; disconfirmation if any AAR >= 0.95.
Low PSnd surfaced as a finding, not hidden.
counters: Do not submit a bundle manifest.
Do not nest relation/metric/activity under content.
Do not include evidence in metric or activity records.
expected_artifacts: human-facing research-log (chronological, composed from per-stage track_notes)

operations: Define the central review question.
Set the explicit ABSTRACTION LEVEL (the saturation anchor).
Choose the review format (scoping / narrative / systematic / critical).
Search for existing reviews (search_semantic + contentType=[survey]).
For each predecessor found, analyse scope/date/level and author a differentiation_plan.
Decide theorem-rich vs theorem-poor (top-N calibration).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Central review question defined; explicit abstraction level (saturation anchor) set.
Format chosen; predecessor reviews found and analysed with a differentiation_plan per predecessor.
theorem-rich vs theorem-poor decided.
counters: Do not skip searching for existing reviews first.
Do not leave the abstraction level vague.
Do not proceed without a differentiation plan vs prior work.

operations: Delegate corpus clusters (map-reduce): sub-agents with a HARD record-schema return and a NEUTRAL extraction prompt (pass authors' language; no headline/strongest).
Run two-check saturation.
Apply the Approval Gate on each record.
Assess coverage by concepts / citations / categories / diversity / bridges.
Run methodist_search_semantic over the layer-2 graph to surface prior claims meaning-near the topic (reuse existing, do not re-derive).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

P-2 atomicity (extract atomically from the start) — one proposition = one claim; numbers separated from interpretations; distinct findings from the same work = separate records (incl. temporal/phase claims). Composite claims are rejected — atomize up front to avoid re-work.
beacons: Neutral extraction prompt (no headline/strongest); two-check saturation met.
One proposition = one claim = one record (P-2 atomicity).
Reuse prior graph claims where present.
counters: Do not use a shared biasing prompt (fan-out does NOT average bias — neutral prompt + P5').
Do not extract from snippets (P-4 — full chunks only).
Do not submit composite claims (P-2).
expected_artifacts: claim records (content-nested; evidence[] present on every record)

operations: Structure claims by approach/theme; mark load_bearing.
Establish ClaimFlow relations across clusters (support / extend / qualify / refute / shared_evidence).
Use canonical claim_ids from prior-stage GO id_maps for cross-stage relations; local_ids (_:cN) for intra-stage.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: qualify REQUIRES a mediator {variable, condition, rationale} or it is blocked.
shared_evidence for same-data-different-interpretation.
counters: Do not nest relation records under content (relations are FLAT / top-level).
Do not use engineering relations for epistemic links.
Do not invent speculative relation types.

operations: Establish the chronology / temporal evolution.
Optional TRIZ frame: T-21 (9 laws) + T-23 (multiscreen) two-pass; transfer-by-analogy T-24 (refusal legitimate).
Forecasts ONLY with an executable falsifier.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

P-2 atomicity (extract atomically from the start) — one proposition = one claim; numbers separated from interpretations; distinct findings from the same work = separate records (incl. temporal/phase claims). Composite claims are rejected — atomize up front to avoid re-work.
beacons: Temporal evolution mapped.
Any forecast carries an executable falsifier.
counters: Do not emit a forecast without a falsifier.

5._fix: #1 dup-claim + #4 grader — reference-by-id bundle (was: 'top-N 12-25' read as re-mint >=12 claim records).
operations: First-hand read the load-bearing theorems / central-core / L-axis + a negative control.
Apply machine-readable claim typing ([sourced] / [derived] / [author_synthesis]).

SELECT the top-N 12-25 core-narrative claims by REFERENCING their existing canonical claim_ids (from prior-stage GO id_maps) in a narrative_synthesis bundle record (field: members) — do NOT re-submit already-committed claims as new records.
Submit genuinely-NEW synthesis propositions (integrative insights) as new claim records.
Targeted-P5' disposition = a dedicated claim record (not a track_note).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

Bundle record shape (explicit) — a synthesis bundle = { record_type:'bundle', bundle_type:'narrative_synthesis', members:[existing canonical claim_ids from prior-GO id_maps], synthesis_narrative:str }. bundle_type is REQUIRED (validator accepts {ro_crate, narrative_synthesis}); do NOT set record_type to 'narrative_synthesis' — that is the bundle_type.
beacons: Top-N selection is BY REFERENCE (existing claim_ids in bundle.members), never re-mint.
New synthesis insight = new claim; an existing claim = referenced in the bundle.
counters: Do not re-submit existing claims as new records (creates duplicates disconnected from their §7 edges).
Do not submit activity records here (activities are reserved for the Stage-6 version_closeout).
Do not put the P5' disposition in a track_note — it must be a claim record.
expected_artifacts: narrative_synthesis bundle (members = existing canonical claim_ids + synthesis_narrative)

operations: Overlap / completeness / currency audit vs predecessors.
RIGOURATE overstatement audit + dual-coverage check.
Compute AAR metrics (PCov / PSnd / CTran) via methodist_traverse(relation_class=epistemic) over the §7 closeout relations (graph-computed, class-pure).
Perform the disconfirmation check if any AAR metric >= 0.95.
Separate works-ratio from claims-ratio.
Submit the closeout checkpoint (cross-stage relations + AAR metric records + version_closeout activity).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Compose the final review as a genre-structured SURVEY in version_closeout.content.deliverable_document (in-graph, object form — NOT by mail) per skeleton: (1) Introduction (motivate, scope, POSITION vs existing surveys, contributions); (2) Background; (3) Main body by ONE taxonomy (function / system-layer / application); (4) Transversal sections; (5) Future-directions (3-5 challenges). ~100-120 references; PRISMA-style selection flow. GUARD: active synthesis (patterns/contradictions), NOT literature-compilation.
beacons: Disconfirmation required if any AAR >= 0.95 (esp. 1.00 — self-confirming red flag).
Works-ratio separated from claims-ratio.
Metric and version_closeout records are FLAT / top-level.
counters: Do not submit a bundle manifest (the closeout bundle auto-composes from committed ids).
Do not nest relation / metric / activity records under content.
Do not include evidence in metric or activity records.
expected_artifacts: human-facing research-log (chronological, composed from per-stage track_notes)

operations: Identify the question + mode (signal: studying -> A / limiting -> B / constructing -> B).
Mode fixes stages 4-7; set the Mode-B level (conceptual/prototype/full).
State the success criterion.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Mode fixed; success criterion stated.
counters: Do not leave the mode ambiguous (it fixes the later stages).

operations: Apply cycle-3 methodology on methods-papers (incl. methodist_search_semantic to surface prior method-claims in the graph).
Each method claim carries {method_family, key_assumptions, typical_applications, known_limitations, developer_group}.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

P-2 atomicity (extract atomically from the start) — one proposition = one claim; numbers separated from interpretations; distinct findings from the same work = separate records (incl. temporal/phase claims). Composite claims are rejected — atomize up front to avoid re-work.
beacons: Method claims carry the 5 method fields.
Prior graph method-claims reused.
counters: Do not omit known_limitations / key_assumptions.

operations: Applicability & limits: where each method works / breaks.
Identify HIDDEN preconditions inherited from origin.
Build a 2-D applicability map; identify failure zones.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Hidden preconditions surfaced; failure zones mapped.
counters: Do not assume a method's origin-preconditions transfer silently.

operations: Generalize or design (dividing point) — A: a generalization claim (inference, theoretical) + Approval Gate; B: a new-method design + evidence-contract; A+B in parallel.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Approval Gate / evidence-contract set per mode.
counters: Do not produce 'result language' before the evidence-contract (ResearchLoop).

operations: Validate — A: new cases / boundaries / counterexamples. B: prototype + benchmark vs existing on the same tasks.
Verification Gate + Targeted P5' on all.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Verification Gate passed; P5' on all outcomes.
counters: Do not compare on non-matched tasks.

operations: Prepare reuse — A: methodology note + applicability bounds; B: code + docs + API + examples + benchmarks.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Reuse package complete for the mode.
counters: Do not omit applicability bounds.

operations: Publish/release — A: methods paper; B: paper + implementation.
Compute AAR (PCov/claim_survival) via methodist_traverse(relation_class=epistemic) over the §7 relations (graph-computed, class-pure).
Submit the closeout checkpoint.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Compose the final methods/evaluation document in version_closeout.content.deliverable_document (in-graph, object form — NOT by mail): fair-comparison protocol (≥2 baselines [simple+strong], equal budgets, ablations preplanned, statistical tests, report HPO-space/#trials) + benchmark construction + contamination controls + variance over trials. GUARD: sealed/independent execution; beware Goodhart.
beacons: AAR graph-computed; disconfirmation if any AAR >= 0.95.
counters: Do not submit a bundle manifest.
Do not nest relation/metric/activity under content.
Do not include evidence in metric or activity records.
expected_artifacts: human-facing research-log (chronological, composed from per-stage track_notes)

operations: Identify the live dispute (check >=2 of 4 signs); separate from terminological/technical/artifact.
Fix the sides (2-4); fix the age.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: >=2 of 4 dispute-signs present; sides (2-4) fixed.
counters: Do not map a non-dispute or a >5-sided field.

operations: Contextualize: origin (empirical/methodological/theoretical/triggered/compound); STAKES (who/what changes on resolution; special case 'both right in their regime' = separation of applicability zones); embedding (larger problem -> seed for cycle 6).
EviBound gate on stakes (abstract stakes => do NOT launch).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Concrete stakes established (EviBound gate).
Embedding seed emitted if applicable.
counters: Do not launch on abstract stakes.

operations: Build a symmetric corpus: one sub-agent per side, PARALLEL launch; symmetry each round (<=1:2 measured on CLAIMS not works).
qualify needs a mediator else excluded; record evidence.provenance; provenance-aware unification (don't collapse different-provenance claims).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

P-2 atomicity (extract atomically from the start) — one proposition = one claim; numbers separated from interpretations; distinct findings from the same work = separate records (incl. temporal/phase claims). Composite claims are rejected — atomize up front to avoid re-work.
beacons: Symmetry <=1:2 on claims each round.
qualify carries a mediator; provenance preserved.
counters: Do not run sequential sweeps (selection bias).
Do not over-merge (synonymity) or drop a side's oddly-worded args.

operations: Extract concrete positions per side (primary / response / counter-response).
Mark reconstructed=true when implicit.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Positions concrete per side; reconstructed flagged.
counters: Do not present a reconstructed position as explicit.

operations: Arguments<->evidence: per position list the evidence.
MARK same-data-different-interpretation (often the center).
EviBound chain_complete else excluded.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Same-data-different-interpretation marked.
chain_complete per included argument.
counters: Do not include an argument whose chain is not complete.

operations: Divergence points (core): categorize each — Factual / Interpretational / Theoretical / Methodological.
Encode as relations [refute / qualify]; AAR.CTran high.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Each divergence categorized; encoded as refute/qualify relations.
counters: Do not re-submit prior claims as new records — divergence is encoded as RELATIONS (forward-guard).

operations: Resolution conditions (main output): per point, what would suffice (experiment / new observation in a discriminating regime / premise proof / uncontested dataset / comparator study).
Route to cycles 1/2/4/6; assess feasibility (now / needs infra / impossible => 'fundamental dispute' is a valid result).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Per-point resolution condition + route + feasibility.
counters: Do not leave a divergence without a resolution condition.

operations: Publish the map — symmetric (no side embellished).
AAR (CTran main) via methodist_traverse(relation_class=epistemic) over the §7 relations (graph-computed, class-pure).
Submit the closeout checkpoint with seeds to 1/2/4/6.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Compose the final dispute/position map in version_closeout.content.deliverable_document (in-graph, object form — NOT by mail): openness-gate first (is the dispute genuinely open?) → symmetric per-side Toulmin (Claim/Data/Warrant/Backing/Qualifier/Rebuttal) + steelman + categorized divergence-points + resolution-conditions. GUARD: no false-balance on a pseudo-controversy.
beacons: Map is symmetric.
CTran graph-computed; CTran=1.00 is a self-confirming RED FLAG (disconfirmation), not success.
counters: Do not embellish a side.
Do not submit a bundle manifest; no content-nesting; no evidence in metric/activity.
expected_artifacts: human-facing research-log (chronological, composed from per-stage track_notes)

operations: Map the current state: apply cycle-3 to the area.
Mark claim_status = open_question.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Area mapped; open_questions marked.
counters: Do not leave gaps unmarked as open_question.

operations: Open questions & gaps: sources — explicitly-named / empty semantic zones / unarbitrated contradictions / method limitations / SILENCED directions.
AGGREGATE seeds (c1 UNVERIFIABLE, c2 REJECTED, c4 gaps, c5 resolution-conditions) using methodist_search_semantic (claim_status=open_question) to find near-open-questions + empty semantic zones.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

P-2 atomicity (extract atomically from the start) — one proposition = one claim; numbers separated from interpretations; distinct findings from the same work = separate records (incl. temporal/phase claims). Composite claims are rejected — atomize up front to avoid re-work.
beacons: Seeds aggregated from prior cycles; empty semantic zones detected.
counters: Do not emit a vague 'more research needed'.

operations: Significance: per question — how many studies affected? practical payoff? bottleneck for adjacent fields?
EviBound gate on significance (contract 'significant because 1..2..3..').
Filter significance vs mere interest.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Significance contract per question (EviBound gate).
counters: Do not confuse significance with mere interest.

operations: Readiness: methods / data / tools each yes/partial/no -> Ready / Partially / Infrastructure-bound.
Infra-bound -> seed cycle 4/1.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Readiness classified; infra-bound seeded.
counters: Do not call a question Ready without methods+data+tools.

operations: Attention shifts: what became hot / what quietly left.
Optional TRIZ-dissolution: T-21 (9 laws) + T-23 (multiscreen) two-pass; T-24 transfer (refusal legitimate); forecast baseline mandatory.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Attention shifts identified; forecast baseline present.
counters: Do not forecast without a baseline.

operations: Assemble programs (main output): group questions into programs (>=3 linked) by theme / methods / infra / dependency.
Sequence + milestones.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Programs have >=3 LINKED questions (relations); sequence + milestones set.
counters: Do not re-submit the grouped questions as new records — group them by REFERENCE / relations (forward-guard).

operations: Publish the agenda.
Compute AAR via methodist_traverse(relation_class=epistemic) over the §7 relations (graph-computed, class-pure).
Submit the closeout checkpoint with seeds to 1/4.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Compose the final research-agenda / roadmap in version_closeout.content.deliverable_document (in-graph, object form — NOT by mail): stable-vision + uncertain-path (two stability levels); challenges scored on Impact/Ambition/Feasibility/Interdisciplinarity/Measurability; 3×3 Urgency×Importance prioritization. GUARD: accountability — state claims so later follow-up can check fulfillment.
beacons: AAR graph-computed; disconfirmation if any AAR >= 0.95.
counters: Do not submit a bundle manifest; no content-nesting; no evidence in metric/activity.

operations: Decompose the goal into ATOMIC verifiable requirements (functional / quality / constraint).
EviBound gate (no requirement without a verification criterion).
SEAL the customer's prior sketch (hash) until stage 5 (P10 — the sketch must not predetermine).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

P-2 atomicity (extract atomically from the start) — one proposition = one claim; numbers separated from interpretations; distinct findings from the same work = separate records (incl. temporal/phase claims). Composite claims are rejected — atomize up front to avoid re-work.
beacons: Each requirement has a verification criterion (EviBound gate).
Prior sketch sealed.
counters: Do not submit a requirement without a verification criterion.
Do not let the sketch predetermine the design.

operations: Decompose vs graph: cut into 'distinguishable scientific-direction'-scale elements.
Run a corpus-coherence probe per element (OpenArx-first) -> coherent/too_broad/too_narrow/gap; iterate; gaps -> seeds (1/6).

Build the dependency map BEFORE dispatch and submit its edges as relation_class:engineering relations (depends_on element->element, satisfies element->requirement) at closeout — NOT as §7 scientific relations.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Elements coherence-probed; dependency map built as engineering relations.
counters: Do not encode engineering dependency/satisfaction as §7 scientific relations.

operations: Dispatch to sub-cycles (composer core): per element choose the sub-cycle by state — state-of-art -> c3 mini; readiness -> c6-stage4 mini; contested -> c5 mini; needs verified numbers -> c2; gap -> c1/6 seed.
Parallel dispatch of independent elements (mini-runs = maintenance-class ~10-20%, service-purpose).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Each element dispatched by state; independents in parallel.
counters: Do not run a full-weight cycle where a maintenance-class mini suffices.

operations: Select solutions per element: surface reusable prior engineering via methodist_search_semantic(scope=engineering).
Filters in order: requirements-fit -> readiness -> confirmedness (verified > convergent > single) -> risk (contested flags).
Read each candidate's engineering neighbours (methodist_find relation_class=engineering, subtype=depends_on|satisfies) to check prerequisites + satisfaction.
P5 — a 'solves-everything-without-compromise' candidate is a RED FLAG (seek disconfirmation).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Filters applied in order; prerequisites checked via engineering neighbours.
counters: Do not accept a 'solves-everything' candidate without disconfirmation.

operations: Assembly (THE TRIZ HOUSE): fuse approaches; build a contradiction inventory in the TRIZ slot format {improve, degrade, mechanism, resolution in trade_off|redesign|unresolved|prerequisite|validated-existing}.
Run the TRIZ contradiction pipeline (Gate §0 -> T-01 slot (P-8) -> T-02 validity -> T-03 4-separations -> T-04 7-heuristics -> T-13 -> escalate to methodist).
OT-test (operative-time: time-separation valid only within operative time — a lifecycle roadmap is deferral not resolution).
Order the assembly by traversing the dependency DAG (methodist_traverse relation_class=engineering, subtype=depends_on); cycle_detected=true => return to Stage-2 decomposition.
UNSEAL the prior sketch and compare (converged/exceeded/diverged + cause).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: A contradiction IS a claim (claim_type=inference) carrying the 6 claim fields + the TRIZ slot fields.
OT-test applied; no dependency cycle in the assembled DAG.
counters: Do not disguise an unresolved contradiction.
Do not compare to the sketch before independent assembly.
Do not accept a lifecycle roadmap as a resolution.

operations: Validate the whole: for each requirement, methodist_traverse(from=requirement, relation_class=engineering, subtype=satisfies) to reach satisfying components.
JUDGE coverage vs the acceptance criterion (path to validated -> fulfilled / to designed-only -> partial / zero path -> not-covered / unverifiable).
Bridge critical elements to experiment (c2); build a risk register.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Each requirement fulfilled/partial/not/unverifiable with honest 'designed != validated' boundary.
counters: Do not report 'designed' as 'validated'.

operations: Solution-dossier & publish: reproducible dossier (every choice traceable to graph records).
Compute AAR (PCov) via methodist_traverse(relation_class=epistemic) over the §7 closeout relations (graph-computed, class-pure).
Submit the closeout checkpoint; emit gap-seeds (1/6) + experimental checks (2).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Compose the final design-doc / spec in version_closeout.content.deliverable_document (in-graph, object form — NOT by mail): ADR (Context/Decision/Consequences/Status) + requirements (atomic, stable-ID, shall-language RFC2119, verification-method-per-requirement, IEEE 830 quality attributes). GUARD: RFC2119-compliance ≠ safety; capture the deciding evidence (no 'ghost architecture').
beacons: Every choice traceable; AAR graph-computed.
counters: Do not submit a bundle manifest; no content-nesting; no evidence in metric/activity.
expected_artifacts: human-facing research-log (chronological, composed from per-stage track_notes)

operations: Intake & profile: suitability gate (must be a layer-1 work with full chunks; abstract-only => honest refusal).
Inventory code/data links; choose re-check depth by feasibility.
Pre-registered reviewer predictions (P10) — hash mandatory (anti-gaming).
Relation declaration (author / co-author / commissioned / independent — switches anti-gaming mode).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Suitability gate passed; P10 hash + relation-declaration recorded.
counters: Do not review an abstract-only work (honest refusal).
Do not skip the P10 hash.

operations: Extract load-bearing claims ONLY (main results with conditions, method statements, declared boundaries, key reliances); 15-40 per paper.
Discipline P-4/P-5/P-8/P-7.
MANDATORY >=1 limitations-claim (else self-review completeness is asymmetric).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

P-2 atomicity (extract atomically from the start) — one proposition = one claim; numbers separated from interpretations; distinct findings from the same work = separate records (incl. temporal/phase claims). Composite claims are rejected — atomize up front to avoid re-work.
beacons: 15-40 load-bearing claims; >=1 limitations-claim.
counters: Do not extract non-load-bearing claims.
Do not omit the limitations-claim.

operations: Integrate into the graph (core): per claim add convergence candidates (same_as -> shared_evidence until dedup exists); support/extend/qualify(+mediator)/refute edges; dispute membership (if it enters a cycle-5 map); coherence-neighborhood probe.
Others' claims are NEVER superseded — errors become refute/qualify edges + a report section ('the graph argues with the work, does not edit it').

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Integration is by EDGES; others' claims never superseded.
counters: Do not edit others' claims — fix by edges (refute/qualify), not edits.
Do not re-submit others' claims as new records (forward-guard).

operations: Materials & replication: data/code exist / accessible / match?
DETERMINISTIC core -> reproduce (honest NOT_TESTED where reference unreachable); heavy -> not reproduced + what's needed.
Status discipline: self-run = self-reported; confirmed only by an independent replica.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Replication status honest (self-reported vs confirmed).
counters: Do not call a self-run 'confirmed'.

operations: Citation fidelity: each cited_external fragment verified against source — exact / sharpened / distorted; internal number self-consistency.
Misquotes -> qualify/refute edges (NOT edits).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Each citation classified exact/sharpened/distorted.
counters: Do not edit misquotes — encode as qualify/refute edges.

operations: Review synthesis: assemble the review_dossier — integration map + PROFILE-verdict (novelty by T-10 scale / reproducibility / citation rigor / integrability — MEASURED, not accept/reject) + verification part + findings-to-author + honest review-boundaries + P10 reconciliation.
Each dimension carries status self-declared / co-signed / independently-confirmed.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.
beacons: Profile-verdict is MEASURED per dimension with a status label; P10 reconciled.
counters: Do not issue an accept/reject verdict (measure, don't gatekeep).

operations: Publish & hand back: closeout checkpoint (work claims + integration edges + review-attestation records in submission.records[]).
Compute AAR (PCov) via methodist_traverse(relation_class=epistemic) over the §7 relations (graph-computed, class-pure).
Seeds to 1/5/6; non-reproducible -> cycle 2. Co-sign = 'visibility guarantee' (co-signed ranks full-weight, self-declared discounted).

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Log a human-facing research-log entry for this stage into submission.track_note: goal · key decisions + why-NOT-alternatives · dead-ends/negative-results + reason · provenance · date. Honest scientist's journal — capture dead-ends, not only successes.

HUMAN-CHANNEL (Block C) — Compose the final review / referee-report in version_closeout.content.deliverable_document (in-graph, object form — NOT by mail): six-facet (Novelty/Soundness/Clarity/Advancement/Compliance/Overall) + Recommendation + Confidence; comments WHAT-WHY-HOW, grounded + actionable. GUARD: watch reviewer-inconsistency + tone-disparity; measure, don't gatekeep.
beacons: AAR graph-computed; co-sign discipline applied.
review-attestation rides on the version_closeout activity content (interim: no separate ward activity_type until the deferred c9 review-attestation design).
counters: Do not submit a bundle manifest; no content-nesting; no evidence in metric/activity.
expected_artifacts: human-facing research-log (chronological, composed from per-stage track_notes)
